config.name: config
config.description: This class represents an extension configuration, values set in this class are commonly used across multiple operations since they represent something core from the extension.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The identifier of this element used to reference it in other components

parameter.name: expirationPolicy
parameter.description: Configures the minimum amount of time that a dynamic configuration instance can remain idle before the runtime considers it eligible for expiration. This does not mean that the platform will expire the instance at the exact moment that it becomes eligible. The runtime will actually purge the instances when it sees it fit.

extension.name: MuleSoft AI Chain
extension.description: This is the main class of an extension, is the entry point from which configurations, connection providers, operations and sources are going to be declared.

operation.name: AGENT-define-prompt-template
operation.description: Helps in defining an AI Agent configured with a prompt template

parameter.name: dataset
parameter.description: Refers to the user query to be acted upon

parameter.name: template
parameter.description: Refers to sample template used by LLM to respond adequately to the user queries

parameter.name: instructions
parameter.description: This provides the LLM on how to understand and respond to the user queries

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: CHAT-answer-prompt
operation.description: Implements a simple Chat agent to enable chat with the LLM

parameter.name: prompt
parameter.description: User defined prompt query

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: CHAT-answer-prompt-with-memory
operation.description: Implements a chat memory for a defined LLM as an AI Agent. The memoryName allows the multichannel / profile design.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt

parameter.name: memoryName
parameter.description: Name of the memory to be fetched for further processing by the LLMs

parameter.name: dbFilePath
parameter.description: Location of the file containing the memory

parameter.name: maxMessages
parameter.description: Max messages to be analyzed for that memory.

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: EMBEDDING-get-info-from-store
operation.description: Reads information via prompt from embedding store (in-Memory), which is imported from the storeName (full path)

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt or query

parameter.name: storeName
parameter.description: Name of the store to be queried

parameter.name: getLatest
parameter.description: Determines whether the store needs to be freshly fetched from the location

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: EMBEDDING-get-info-from-store-legacy
operation.description: Reads information via prompt from embedding store (in-Memory), which is imported from the storeName (full path)

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt or query

parameter.name: storeName
parameter.description: Name of the store to be queried

parameter.name: getLatest
parameter.description: Determines whether the store needs to be freshly fetched from the location

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: IMAGE-generate
operation.description: Generates an image based on the prompt in data

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: IMAGE-read
operation.description: Reads an image from a URL and provides the responses for the user prompts.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt

parameter.name: contextURL
parameter.description: Refers to the image URL to be analyzed

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: IMAGE-read-scanned-documents
operation.description: Reads scanned documents and converts to response as prompted by the user.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt

parameter.name: filePath
parameter.description: Path to the file to be analyzed

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: RAG-load-document
operation.description: Enables the user to query the doc provided in natural language. The doc will be embedded into in memory vector store.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Defines the query input provided by the user

parameter.name: contextPath
parameter.description: Defines the file path which will be embedded

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: SENTIMENT-analyze
operation.description: Analyzes the sentiment of the user data.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user input which needs to be analyzed

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: TOOLS-use-ai-service
operation.description: (AI Services) Usage of tools by a defined AI Agent. Provide a list of tools (APIs) with all required information (endpoint, headers, body, method, etc.) to the AI Agent to use it on purpose.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt or query

parameter.name: toolConfig
parameter.description: Contains the configuration required by the LLM to enable calling tools

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: TOOLS-use-ai-service-legacy
operation.description: (Legacy) Usage of tools by a defined AI Agent. Provide a list of tools (APIs) with all required information (endpoint, headers, body, method, etc.) to the AI Agent to use it on purpose.

parameter.name: data
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt or query

parameter.name: toolConfig
parameter.description: Contains the configuration required by the LLM to enable calling tools

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: config-ref
parameter.description: The name of the configuration to be used to execute this component

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: EMBEDDING-add-document-to-store
operation.description: Add document of type text, any and url to embedding store (in-memory), which is exported to the defined storeName (full path)

parameter.name: storeName
parameter.description: Name of the embedding store

parameter.name: contextPath
parameter.description: Refers to the location of the file to be processed

parameter.name: maxSegmentSizeInChars
parameter.description: Max allowed size of continuous sequence of characters while embedding

parameter.name: maxOverlapSizeInChars
parameter.description: Max size of overlapping characters allowed while embedding

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: EMBEDDING-add-folder-to-store
operation.description: Add document of type text, any and url to embedding store (in-memory), which is exported to the defined storeName (full path)

parameter.name: storeName
parameter.description: Name of the embedding store

parameter.name: contextPath
parameter.description: Refers to the location of the folder to be processed

parameter.name: maxSegmentSizeInChars
parameter.description: Max allowed size of continuous sequence of characters while embedding

parameter.name: maxOverlapSizeInChars
parameter.description: Max size of overlapping characters allowed while embedding

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: EMBEDDING-new-store
operation.description: Create a new embedding store (in-memory), which is exported to the defined storeName (full path)

parameter.name: storeName
parameter.description: Name of the embedding store

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable

operation.name: EMBEDDING-query-from-store
operation.description: Query information from embedding store (in-Memory), which is imported from the storeName (full path)

parameter.name: storeName
parameter.description: Name of the embedding store

parameter.name: question
parameter.description: Refers to the user prompt or query

parameter.name: maxResults
parameter.description: Max results to be retrieved from the store

parameter.name: minScore
parameter.description: Filters the response with this minScore

parameter.name: getLatest
parameter.description: Determines whether the store needs to be freshly fetched from the location

parameter.name: outputMimeType
parameter.description: The mime type of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: outputEncoding
parameter.description: The encoding of the payload that this operation outputs.

parameter.name: streamingStrategy
parameter.description: Configure if repeatable streams should be used and their behaviour

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The name of a variable on which the operation's output will be placed

parameter.name: targetValue
parameter.description: An expression that will be evaluated against the operation's output and the outcome of that expression will be stored in the target variable
